positive: A complex, symmetrical celestial mandala design featuring interwoven cosmic elements, blooming bioluminescent flora, and stylized zodiac constellations. The composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for full-chest placement on apparel. Utilize a deep midnight blue and iridescent turquoise color palette, accented by contrasting gold foil effects and stark white linework. The style should be a fusion of detailed Art Nouveau engraving and modern geometric vector art, emphasizing clean, thick outlines and strong negative space. Include crescent moons, stylized nebula swirls, and intricate, symmetrical floral patterns (e.g., mandalas and lotus flowers). The overall effect must be ethereal, mystical, and highly decorative, with all elements isolated on a clean background for maximum print fidelity.
